name: CITIC Guoan Information Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: CITIC Guoan Information Industry Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the cable television (TV) network business in China. It offers digital TV system services, including interactive TV, Internet access, and PAY- HD-TV. The company also provides lithium-ion batteries, and telecom value-added and information system integration services, as well as develops Internet technology and application solutions. In addition, it develops and manages residential properties, hotels, office buildings, and tourism real estate projects. The company is based in Beijing, China.
